name: @caia/lifecycle-conductor
description: Real-DoD Layer 4 — composite solution-lifecycle aggregator. Per ADR-063 (2026-05-25), subscribes to exactly 4 Real-DoD stewards (deploy + usage + activation + outcome) and the orthogonal ea-review-approved state (the spec §4.4 5th gate). Computes per-solution composite state via @caia/state-machine solution-lifecycle FSM, drives transitions, projects to SSE via @caia/pipeline-conductor existing infrastructure, surfaces stuck solutions to INBOX. DoD achieved when all 4 stewards green + ea-review-approved AND fresh for >=24 consecutive hours. Subscription-only; no polling. Pipeline-conductor drift signals are NOT folded in — drift has its own ## DRIFT ALERTS surface from PR #570.
